Event: The Orc Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/10/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: M1


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Orc-Destroyer Mace

When attacking, has 30-33% chance of stunning an enemy for Stats 2.5 sec.

Once in a while, the unit freezes the target of the attack for 3 sec. While frozen, it is unable to move or attack. Also, the cooldown times of the target's gear abilities are increased by 3 sec. Once frozen, the unit explodes the target of the ability, dealing 250000 magic damage to it and all units in a small radius around it. All affected enemies gain stiffness. Their attack speed is reduced by 25% for 3 sec.
Every 3 attacks the unit makes against the stiff target causes an explosion, dealing 200000 magic damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it. The explosion has a 75% chance to freeze all affected enemies for 2 sec. While frozen, they can't move or attack. Also, the cooldown times of the target's gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
